title: What's Your Fitness Goal?
description: Take this quick quiz to discover the training approach that fits your lifestyle and goals.

questions.question: How would you describe your current fitness level?
How many days per week can you train?
What type of training appeals to you most?
What's your biggest challenge right now?

results.title: Structured Strength Program
results.description: Based on your answers, you'd benefit from a structured strength training plan tailored to your schedule. A progressive program with clear milestones will keep you motivated and help you build real, lasting results.

results.title: Active Lifestyle Coaching
results.description: You're looking for a balanced approach that fits into a busy life. A flexible coaching plan combining short, effective workouts with habit-building strategies will help you feel your best without overwhelming your schedule.

results.title: Performance Boost Plan
results.description: You're ready to take your fitness to the next level. A periodized training plan with progressive overload and recovery management will help you break through plateaus and reach peak performance.

results.title: Wellness Reset Program
results.description: Your focus is on feeling great and building sustainable habits. A gentle, progressive program combining movement, mobility, and stress management will help you create a foundation for long-term health.
